The stories mentioned in this edition of Uplink

February 2002
Journalism & NewsroomInvestigative Methods

This brief announcement informs readers that stories from the Uplink newsletter will be available through the IRE Resource Center, with instructions on how to search and order them.

The stories mentioned in this edition of Uplink will soon be available from the IRE Resource Center. Search the story database at www.ire.org/resourcecenter for order numbers. Call 573-882-3364 to order these and other investigative stories.
